'''鈭歱-z-g-s''' ('''kapazgesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exist|exist]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-z-g-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exist|exist]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-z-g-s
|-
! Lemma
| kapazgesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipazgesoko|thipazgesoko]] || [[word:jipazgesoko|jipazgesoko]] || [[word:shipazgesoko|shipazgesoko]] || [[word:kipazgesoko|kipazgesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthupazgesoko|thuthupazgesoko]] || [[word:jujupazgesoko|jujupazgesoko]] || [[word:shushupazgesoko|shushupazgesoko]] || [[word:kukupazgesoko|kukupazgesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thupazgesoko|thupazgesoko]] || [[word:jupazgesoko|jupazgesoko]] || [[word:shupazgesoko|shupazgesoko]] || [[word:kupazgesoko|kupazgesoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thupazgesoko|thupazgesoko]] || [[word:jupazgesoko|jupazgesoko]] || [[word:shupazgesoko|shupazgesoko]] || [[word:kupazgesoko|kupazgesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thepazgesoko|thepazgesoko]] || [[word:jepazgesoko|jepazgesoko]] || [[word:shepazgesoko|shepazgesoko]] || [[word:kepazgesoko|kepazgesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothopazgesoko|thothopazgesoko]] || [[word:jojopazgesoko|jojopazgesoko]] || [[word:shoshopazgesoko|shoshopazgesoko]] || [[word:kokopazgesoko|kokopazgesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thopazgesoko|thopazgesoko]] || [[word:jopazgesoko|jopazgesoko]] || [[word:shopazgesoko|shopazgesoko]] || [[word:kopazgesoko|kopazgesoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thopazgesoko|thopazgesoko]] || [[word:jopazgesoko|jopazgesoko]] || [[word:shopazgesoko|shopazgesoko]] || [[word:kopazgesoko|kopazgesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙pazgesoko|th忙pazgesoko]] || [[word:j忙pazgesoko|j忙pazgesoko]] || [[word:sh忙pazgesoko|sh忙pazgesoko]] || [[word:k忙pazgesoko|k忙pazgesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathapazgesoko|thathapazgesoko]] || [[word:jajapazgesoko|jajapazgesoko]] || [[word:shashapazgesoko|shashapazgesoko]] || [[word:kakapazgesoko|kakapazgesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thapazgesoko|thapazgesoko]] || [[word:japazgesoko|japazgesoko]] || [[word:shapazgesoko|shapazgesoko]] || [[word:kapazgesoko|kapazgesoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thapazgesoko|thapazgesoko]] || [[word:japazgesoko|japazgesoko]] || [[word:shapazgesoko|shapazgesoko]] || [[word:kapazgesoko|kapazgesoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
